sources.name: OIG LEIE Exclusion List
sources.failure_action: block_publish — do not publish updated scores until a fresh pull succeeds; retain last-known-good file and flag all affected NPI scores as stale
sources.notes: Exclusions are cumulative. A missing month must be back-filled before scoring resumes.

sources.name: NPPES NPI Registry
sources.failure_action: use_stale_up_to_14d — fall back to the previous weekly snapshot for up to 14 days; after 14 days escalate to oncall and halt NPI enrichment
sources.notes: Full replacement file each week (~9 GB). Deduplication against prior snapshot required. Weekly automated pull; manual oversight by Othmane.

sources.name: CMS QPP/MIPS Final Scores
sources.failure_action: use_stale — retain prior year's data; log warning in pipeline run report; notify Antoine
sources.notes: Performance year lags by ~18 months. Scores without a current MIPS entry fall back to the most recent available year.

sources.name: Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners
sources.failure_action: block_publish — utilization dimension cannot be scored without this file; retain last-known-good and escalate to Antoine immediately
sources.notes: Covers Part B claims by NPI and procedure code. Volume ~3 GB uncompressed.

sources.name: Medicaid Provider Spending (T-MSIS)
sources.typical_release: Variable — historically spring of following year
sources.failure_action: use_stale_with_flag — if unavailable, score utilization dimension from Medicare data only and set confidence_tier to 'low'; alert Antoine; do NOT block publish
sources.notes: OPERATIONALLY FRAGILE. Released Feb 2026, went unavailable late March 2026. Must build fallback: (1) cache the Feb 2026 file locally before each pull attempt, (2) if HTTP 404/403 or checksum mismatch, switch to cached copy automatically, (3) Antoine monitors CMS release page weekly.

sources.name: CMS Facility Affiliations
sources.failure_action: use_stale — retain prior quarter's file; log warning; downstream affiliation enrichment continues with stale data
sources.notes: Links NPIs to hospital and facility CCNs. Used for network and affiliation context in step 2.

sources.name: Hospital General Info + Quality Measures
sources.failure_action: use_stale — retain prior quarter's file; log warning; notify Othmane
sources.notes: Joined to provider records via CMS Facility Affiliations (cms_facility_affiliations). CCN is the join key.

sources.name: State Medical Board Records
sources.failure_action: block_state_publish — if a state pull fails, block score publication for providers in that state only; other states unaffected; notify Othmane
sources.notes: Per-state integration required. WV integration complete. MA integration pending. Each state has its own URL, format, and release schedule. License-to-NPI crosswalk maintained separately.

sources.name: Provider-Submitted Data (C4)
sources.typical_release: Continuous — triggered by provider portal submissions
sources.failure_action: queue_retry — failed ingestion events are placed in a dead-letter queue and retried up to 3 times; provider notified via portal if all retries fail
sources.notes: Covers credentials, board certifications, affiliations, and other attestations submitted through the C4 provider portal. Not required for base scoring; enriches confidence tier when present.
